Stack Buffer Overflow in Input Processing
Integer Underflow in Memory-Pool Block Split
Integer Division by Zero in Command Routing

truthAudit.Summary: Audit confirms the existence of Command Injection across configuration handling and internal administrative consoles, as well as a stack-based buffer overflow during input processing for mathematical expressions. While previous findings provided correct locations for these vulnerabilities, the recorded severity for the Command Injection (sc-v3-004 derivative) appears underestimated, and the severity of the Stack Buffer Overflow (SC-V3-005) was conservatively rated.
